detect.predict.instructions: Analyze the supplied passage for linguistic, stylistic, and structural signals associated with AI-generated versus human-written text. Consider factors such as formulaic phrasing, repetition, coherence patterns, specificity, natural variation, and errors, while avoiding reliance on topic or unsupported assumptions. Make a forced-choice classification based only on the passage. Output exactly one label: `AI-generated` or `Human-written`.
detect.predict.signature:
StringSignature(text -> reasoning, is_ai
    instructions='Analyze the supplied passage for linguistic, stylistic, and structural signals associated with AI-generated versus human-written text. Consider factors such as formulaic phrasing, repetition, coherence patterns, specificity, natural variation, and errors, while avoiding reliance on topic or unsupported assumptions. Make a forced-choice classification based only on the passage. Output exactly one label: `AI-generated` or `Human-written`.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'desc': 'Passage to classify', '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:'})
    reasoning = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'desc': '${reasoning}', '__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Reasoning:'})
    is_ai = Field(annotation=bool required=True json_schema_extra={'desc': 'True for AI-generated text; otherwise False', '__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Verdict:'})
)

fields.name: is_ai
fields.description: True for AI-generated text; otherwise False
